fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Elastic Security server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Connector Name or ID
fields.description: Connectors allow you to send Elastic Security cases into other systems (only ServiceNow, Jira, or IBM Resilient). Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Issue Type
fields.description: Type of the Jira issue to create for this case

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Priority of the Jira issue to create for this case

fields.label: Urgency
fields.description: Urgency of the ServiceNow ITSM issue to create for this case

fields.label: Severity
fields.description: Severity of the ServiceNow ITSM issue to create for this case

fields.label: Impact
fields.description: Impact of the ServiceNow ITSM issue to create for this case

fields.label: Category
fields.description: Category of the ServiceNow ITSM issue to create for this case

fields.label: Issue Types
fields.description: Comma-separated list of numerical types of the IBM Resilient issue to create for this case

fields.label: Severity Code
fields.description: Severity code of the IBM Resilient issue to create for this case

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: description, owner, syncAlerts)

fields.description: Host of your Elastic Security server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Filters
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: status, tags)

fields.label: Sort
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: sortOptionsProperties, sortOptionsProperties.sortField, sortOptionsProperties.sortOrder)
